title: Lint Violation Envelope
description: spec-119 D-119-05 lint-as-prompt structured violation envelope. Replaces prose 'violation detected' / 'deviation' strings. Compliance reporters and skill handlers emit objects matching this schema instead of natural-language labels so downstream Generators consume actionable diffs.

rule_id.description: Stable identifier of the rule violated. kebab-case. Example: 'logger-structured-args'.

severity.description: error blocks the gate; warning surfaces in reports without blocking; info is advisory.

expected.description: Concrete representation of what the rule expects. Example: 'logger.info({event, ...data})'.

actual.description: Concrete representation of what was found. Example: 'console.log(`event=${event}`)'.

fix_hint.description: One-line directive for the Generator to act on. Example: 'Replace console.log with logger.info passing a structured object.'

file.description: Optional source path relative to the project root.

line.description: Optional 1-indexed line number within the source file.

context.description: Optional surrounding code or markdown excerpt for human review.
